title: Sensing the World
subtitle: Awareness begins to develop
description: By week 15, your baby continues to grow steadily, and sensory development begins. The body becomes more proportionate, and subtle movements increase, even if they are not yet felt.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements become more active, though still not always noticeable
Development of sensory organs like ears continues
care_tips: Maintain a nutritious and balanced diet
Stay hydrated and follow regular routines
Engage in light physical activity and gentle stretching

medical_checkups.note: Monitoring continues with focus on growth and maternal health.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Tracks fetal growth and maternal health

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may recommend additional screenings based on previous results and individual factors.

important_note: Sensory development marks an important step in your baby’s growth journey.
reassurance: Your baby is becoming more active and responsive with each passing week.
medical_disclaimer: Always follow your healthcare provider’s recommendations for tests and care.

diabetes.personalized_description: Stable blood sugar levels support continued growth and sensory development.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be monitored during routine visits.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron levels support oxygen supply and energy levels.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain strength and energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation and fetal development.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing growth and metabolism.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As development continues, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support a healthy journey.
